name: email-triage
description: Epistemic email triage with 30 Bayesian rationality criteria (LessWrong Sequences). Multi-axis scoring, 4-tier routing with color indicators (🔴🟡🔵⚪) and explanations. Supports iCloud (Mail.app), Gmail (MCP), and other providers. Includes production-tested resilience, safe batch moving pattern, HTML content validation, and graceful degradation.
